description: Refine the model so Acquisition.Source means where/how data is retrieved, Acquisition.Program means why/what Garden seeks, and a program-source configuration owns provider query templates, budget, cadence, enrichment policy, and enabled state. Use Ash resources/actions and code interfaces; do not leave durable configuration in ad hoc metadata. Acceptance: reviewed resource/action design and migration plan grounded in the implemented resource map.
title: Define acquisition channel and program-source contract
